full_text:
Zhou Jun (Kailin) 周浚 (開林)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Jun (周浚), styledKailin (開林), was born in Ancheng in Runan. Governor of Yang province in Jin. Participated in the conquest of Wu. Zhou Jun was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Zhou Jun lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
